rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Schtasks Child Process
id: 6470cbb3-a339-40dd-8d0e-250013b86828
status: experimental
description: Detects schtasks being run as a child process of explorer.exe to create
  a schedule task.
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/19
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1053
- attack.t1053.005
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
    Image|endswith: \schtasks.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - /create
    - /ru
    - /sc once
    - powershell
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
